arts.ttl: Tottenham fans lose faith with Ange Postecoglou after Liverpool hammering - 'Out of his depth'
arts.sum: Tottenham's 6-3 defeat to Liverpool has led to some fans demanding embattled manager Ange Postecoglou be sacked, having already overseen eight losses in the Premier League this season

arts.ttl: Premier League Team of the Week: Mohamed Salah, Gabriel Jesus, Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Sports Mole selects its Premier League Team of the Week, including Mohamed Salah, Gabriel Jesus and Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou loves what Tottenham fans chanted despite being thrashed by Liverpool
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has admitted that he loved what Tottenham Hotspur’s supporters were singing despite their team losing 5-2 to Liverpool. Tottenham ended the game being...

arts.ttl: Liverpool have to wait for Joao Pedro - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool's move for Joao Pedro will have to wait until the summer, Paris St-Germain willing to pay £83m for Alexander Isak, Frenkie de Jong increasingly likely to leave Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hails his Liverpool side and insists they could have scored even more against Tottenham but refuses to get carried away in title race
arts.sum: In the last seven seasons when Liverpool have been top of the table at Christmas they have only won the league once and their Dutch boss refused to get carried away.

arts.ttl: Slot's Liverpool confirm title pedigree as Salah shows value
arts.sum: Arne Slot's remarkable transition at Liverpool makes them the team to beat in the title race - and the stats prove it, writes Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold shows true Liverpool feelings with three-word message after Luis Diaz moment
arts.sum: Liverpool sealed a significant victory over Tottenham to reinforce their position at the summit of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou’s unserious Spurs exposed by serious Liverpool | Jonathan Liew
arts.athr: Jonathan Liew at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: Spurs can win spectacularly and are fun but they could have had Arne Slot in 2023 and instead have the same pot of relaunched stasis Liverpool are serious about this. They’re not in London for souvenirs or sightseeing. They had a game four days earlier, they’ve got another in four days’ time, and so all they really want for Christmas is to get in, get the points and get out. They’d rather do it clean. But they’ll do it dirty if they have to. Above all, they know exactly what they want. Luis Díaz wants to spin off his man and run from deep, and Ryan Gravenberch wants to plug the gaps and get the ball moving, Dominik Szoboszlai wants you to commit, but not until he’s put you half a step off balance first, and Mo Salah wants to be Mo Salah. They can go short or long, hit you from every angle, hurt you from every bit of the pitch. Nine Liverpool players made a key pass in this game, including the goalkeeper and both full-backs. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Gary Neville sends Liverpool warning to Premier League title challengers - 'Best I've seen'
arts.sum: Gary Neville claimed Liverpool produced the best half of football this season as they dominated Tottenham en route to their 6-3 success which saw them increase their lead at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou claims it's 'for others to judge' whether he's under pressure but will refuse to 'flip a switch' on his style of play despite Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou admitted concerns over his future at Tottenham though refused to change his ways after Liverpool thrashed Spurs to go four points clear at the top of the Premier League.
